scripts.workspace:test: node --test tests/guards/config-typescript.test.mjs tests/guards/config-quality.test.mjs tests/guards/workspace-layout.test.mjs tests/guards/packages-consumers.test.mjs tests/guards/shared-boundary.test.mjs tests/guards/domain-boundaries.test.mjs tests/guards/ios-scope.test.mjs tests/guards/android-scope.test.mjs tests/guards/workspace-workflows.test.mjs tests/railway-cron-poc.test.mjs
scripts.db:types: bash scripts/supabase.sh gen types typescript --local --schema public > packages/contracts/src/database.types.ts
scripts.clean: turbo run clean && find . -name 'node_modules' -prune -o -name '.turbo' -print | xargs rm -rf
scripts.clean:dist: find apps packages -name 'dist' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + ; find apps packages -name 'build' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + ; find apps packages -name 'out' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + ; find apps packages -name '.next' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} +
